commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ea2e2be8efce2a8074a14754f9edb3f6ff98524a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `system_event` inbound event kind, allows explicit `NO_REPLY` silence for those turns through reply dispatch and incomplete-turn handling, updates MCP header parsing, docs, and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +316, Docs +14. Total +360 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible for the review finding: `RunMessageActionParams.inboundEventKind` can now be `system_event`, but current-main `message.action` schema and handler still accept only `user_request` or `room_event`. I did not run a live gateway process in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining code blocker is a narrow protocol enum, handler type, and regression-test propagation repair; maintainers still own final product acceptance of the new core event kind.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
